title: ebenus
intro: Ebenus, also known as the purple cornflower or Ebenus corniculata, is a flowering plant native to the Mediterranean region. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects, making it beneficial in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Ebenus include relief from digestive problems, fever reduction, and wound healing, among others. Herbal preparations of Ebenus include infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties for therapeutic purposes.
